nasb.text: I will heal their apostasy, I will love them freely, For My anger has turned away from them.

esv.text: I will heal their apostasy; I will love them freely, for my anger has turned from them.

cnv.text: “我必醫治他們背道的病， 甘心樂意愛他們， 因為我的怒氣已經遠離他們了。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “我要医治他们的叛道， 心甘情愿地爱他们， 因为我的怒气已经转离他们。
